race.comment: Gollan-trained MARAGICAL (9) rates well and has an inside alley. Has been within range three times at Doomben before leading and folding late at the Gold Coast. First try over this trip, and with a quieter ride will be hard to beat. BOLE LE (1) is racing well. Scored at Moree two back before a 1L defeat over 1600m at Gatton in a 62. Maps well and can bounce back to winning form. LOCH AWE (6) peaks off solid runs in provincial company. Raced a $3.5F at the Gold Coast last time but didn't let down as expected. Switches back in trip with the blinkers on for the first time and deserves plenty of consideration. KEEP IT LOKI (2) will be sharper third-up, and the 4kg claim brings him into it.
